data.name: TOUCH GRASS
data.detailed_description:
You're a terminally online recent college graduate who just won the vacation of a lifetime: a week on Paradise Island. But when your plane goes down over the ocean, you and five beautiful strangers wash up on a mysterious tropical island that seems to have a mind of its own.

[h2]STORY[/h2]

What starts as a desperate survival situation becomes something far stranger. The island provides for your every need - impossibly perfect weather, fruit that tastes like cherished memories, and supplies that appear exactly when you need them. But the island wants something in return: for you to discover who you really are.

Stranded with five women from completely different walks of life, you'll navigate complex relationships, uncover hidden talents, and face the question everyone's been avoiding: what happens when the real world comes calling?

[h2]THE CAST[/h2]

[b]Jessica Martinez[/b] - A famous influencer with 3 million followers, hiding a secret passion for classical piano that she abandoned for fame.

[b]Sophia Williams[/b] - A brilliant data analyst who uses logic to mask her fear of the unknown. Can she learn to trust her heart?

[b]Scarlett Jones[/b] - A fiery bartender and musician running from heartbreak. Her tough exterior hides deep vulnerability.

[b]Swift (Taylor)[/b] - An energetic fitness trainer who never stops moving - because stopping means confronting what she's running from.

[b]Azami Nakamura[/b] - A mysterious linguistics student who seems to understand the island's secrets better than anyone.

[h2]GAMEPLAY FEATURES[/h2]

[list]

[*] [b]Branching Narrative[/b] - Your choices shape relationships and unlock unique story paths. Every decision matters, from who you sit with on the plane to how you handle intimate moments.

[*] [b]Relationship System[/b] - Build trust and affection with each character through meaningful conversations and shared experiences. Different approaches unlock different scenes.

[*] [b]Multiple Episodes[/b] - 5+ hours of story content spread across multiple episodes, each focusing on a different character while advancing the main mystery.

[*] [b]Scene Gallery[/b] - Unlock and revisit memorable moments as you progress through the story.

[*] [b]Island Mysteries[/b] - Discover the supernatural secrets of the island. Why does it provide exactly what you need? What does it want in return?

[/list]

[h2]MATURE CONTENT[/h2]

This game contains adult content including nudity and sexual scenes. All characters are 18+. Adult content can be toggled in the options menu.

[h2]WHAT MAKES IT UNIQUE[/h2]

Touch Grass blends survival drama with romantic visual novel gameplay. Unlike typical dating sims, relationships develop organically through shared crisis and genuine connection. The supernatural island setting creates unique scenarios impossible in real-world settings, while the diverse cast ensures every player finds characters they connect with.

The game features self-aware humor about internet culture, parasocial relationships, and what it means to be "real" in an age of constant performance.

[h2]PLAYTIME[/h2]

[list]

[*] Main story: 5-7 hours

[*] All routes and scenes: 10-15 hours

[*] Completionist (all choices): 15-20 hours

data.short_description: They told you to touch grass. They didn't warn you about the nature spirit waifus waiting outside. 14 elemental girls. One terminally online gamer. The ultimate outdoor experience.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
